chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4239 of 2022 Kashif Malik Versus Government of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. Dated: 13.03.2025 Mr. Abdul Ghaffar for petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant Advocate General. Mr. Masroor Ahmed for KW&SB. -.-.- The petitioner has prayed that the official respondents may be directed to consider the case of the petitioner for promotion and to give promotion to him to the rank of Executive Engineer (E&M) (BS-18). Karachi Water & Sewerage Board who are the main respondent in this case has filed a statement dated 18.12.2024 annexing therewith a letter addressed to the Director Legal, Law Department, KW&SC dated 12.08.2024 which states that the DPC are being carried out for promotion for the relevant grade in phases i.e. Grade BS-19 to BS-20, then BS-18 to BS-19 and then BS-17 to B-18. They have undertaken in the letters that when the DPC is held for promotion from BS-17 to BS-18 the name of the petitioner will be considered by the DPS for promotion. On these letters and undertaking/statement made by the KW&SB, which are taken on record, this petition is disposed of. Head of Const. Benches Judge
